summary: Iteration 68 - Live Map Load Optimization Testing: Verified Leaflet.markercluster integration, client-side clustering, GPS coordinate truncation, 250ms debounce on moveend, and CartoDB dark tiles. All performance optimizations working correctly.

leaflet_markercluster_library.details: Leaflet.markercluster v1.5.3 loaded via CDN (index.html lines 16-17, 20). window.L.markerClusterGroup function confirmed available.

surf_spot_clustering.details: Surf spots cluster when zoomed out. Cluster numbers visible: 3, 2, 4, 6. Green/yellow gradient circles with white numbers. spotClusterRef uses disableClusteringAtZoom: 13.

photographer_clustering.details: Photographer markers cluster separately via photographerClusterRef. Cyan gradient clusters with ping animation. disableClusteringAtZoom: 12 for photographers.

cluster_click_behavior.details: Clicking on cluster zooms in (zoomToBoundsOnClick: true). spiderfyOnMaxZoom enabled. Individual markers appear at high zoom levels.

disable_clustering_at_zoom.details: At zoom 13+ for spots, individual markers shown (not clustered). Screenshot confirms individual pins visible when zoomed into Florida coast.

cartodb_dark_tiles.details: Dark CartoDB tiles loading correctly from cartocdn.com. 40+ tiles confirmed. Map attribution shows 'CARTO'.

debounce_250ms_moveend.code_verified: Line 749: debounce(moveendHandler, 250). Console logs show '[MAP] Move ended - refreshing visible markers' after pan settles.

coordinate_truncation.code_verified: Line 52: truncateCoord = (coord) => Math.round(coord * 100000) / 100000. Used in userMarker (804), spotMarkers (845), photographerMarkers (899).

map_performance.details: Map loads without freezing. Pan/zoom operations smooth. Console shows successful initialization: '[MAP] Map initialized with clustering successfully'.

shooting_labels.details: 2 photographer markers visible with 'SHOOTING' labels (cyan gradient circles with avatar). '2 shooting' indicator in top right.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Map clustering implementation fully verified. Leaflet.markercluster v1.5.3 CDN loaded in index.html. MapPage.js creates two cluster groups: spotClusterRef (disableClusteringAtZoom: 13) and photographerClusterRef (disableClusteringAtZoom: 12). Debounce utility (250ms) applied to moveend event. truncateCoord rounds coordinates to 5 decimals. CartoDB dark tiles confirmed. Console logs: '[MAP] Initializing Leaflet map with clustering...' and '[MAP] Map initialized with clustering successfully'. Performance is smooth with no freezing during pan/zoom.
